transcript: Good morning, can you please confirm your details? My name is [REDACTED], [REDACTED], [REDACTED] is [REDACTED], and my social security number is [REDACTED]. I have been having this weird stomach pain since past 3 days. I have stand near concern, based on our symptoms and examination. This appears to be a acute gastritis. I will prescribe pantoprasol, which is a proton pump inhibitor, along with antacids to reduce the acid in your stomach. Is there anything else I should do? Yes, take properest, avoid spicy oily foods, and make sure you drink plenty of fluids. If symptoms persist, come back for a follow-up after a week.

soap_note.Subjective: Patient reports experiencing stomach pain since past 3 days; concern about acute gastritis
soap_note.Objective: Physical examination and medical history not detailed in transcript
soap_note.Plan: Prescribe pantoprazole (proton pump inhibitor) and antacids, instruct patient to take proper diet, avoid spicy oily foods, and drink plenty of fluids; follow-up in one week if symptoms persist
